metadata.description: Company hub for the Claude Code SDLC Masterclass. Hosts the cc-masterclass-kit plugin: the worked toolkit (commands, skills, sub-agents, gate hooks) built across the course.

plugins.name: cc-masterclass-kit
plugins.description: SDLC toolkit for embedded-C teams: /draft-req and /ship-feature commands; test-gen and release-notes skills; design-reviewer, test-writer, triage, security-reviewer, and reviewer sub-agents; secret-scan and clang-format gate hooks; the git-insights and standup helpers.
